text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our summer—an intense one during which all the
Umamusume of the Mejiro family unite—comes
and goes in a flash.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And as for Mejiro Bright herself...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Zzz... Zzz...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
She's done very well indeed. I can hardly believe
how much training she's managed to complete.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
And while it took time, in the end she proved that
she's taken all of it on board...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
That's just who Bright is. She might come across
as all laid-back, but the truth is...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
She's a real go-getter deep down. She had more
drive than anyone.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright's totally worn out after all the effort
she's put in, but even though she's in resting
mode right now...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's no doubting her inner strength. And once
she wakes up...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer? Hello there...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I must have dozed off at some point. Let me see.
Right now, it's...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Morning, yes?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: My... morning...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: So that's why the sunlight is so bright... Of course.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I've been graced with so much
radiance—mere fragments of the Mejiro light...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
But all that light has come together within me and
formed a shining sun.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I wonder just how much this light will dazzle
Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That light could outshine Silence Suzuka. Or the
light of the illustrious Mejiro family could flicker
out and fade away into the background of the
era.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We won't know what'll happen until we try, but
even so...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I... do have faith, you know.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I have faith... that my beloved family will continue
to shine on, even into the next generation.
